hooks.command: _d="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DIR:-}"; [ -z "$_d" ] && _d="$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/cache/*/superdev/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1)"; [ -z "$_d" ] && _d="$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/superdev/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _s="${_d%/}/hooks/scripts/wave-gate.sh"; [ -f "$_s" ] && bash "$_s" apps/api || true

_d="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DIR:-}"; [ -z "$_d" ] && _d="$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/cache/*/superdev/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1)"; [ -z "$_d" ] && _d="$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/superdev/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; _s="${_d%/}/hooks/scripts/wave-gate.sh"; [ -f "$_s" ] && bash "$_s" apps/web || true

if [ -f packages/contracts/package.json ]; then (cd packages/contracts && (if [ -f ../../bun.lockb ] || [ -f ../../bun.lock ]; then PM=bun; elif [ -f ../../pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then PM=pnpm; elif [ -f ../../yarn.lock ]; then PM=yarn; else PM=npm; fi; $PM run build 2>/dev/null || $PM run compile 2>/dev/null || npx -y tsc) 2>&1 | tail -20); fi

if [ -d apps/web/src/modules ]; then FAT=$(find apps/web/src/modules -name '*.tsx' -newer /tmp/.superdev-tick 2>/dev/null | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | awk '$1 > 300 && $2 != "total" { print $2 ": " $1 " lines" }'); touch /tmp/.superdev-tick; if [ -n "$FAT" ]; then echo "[superdev] FAT-FILE WARNING — files over 300 lines were just written/edited:"; echo "$FAT"; echo "LESSON: frontend module has file(s) >300 lines — dispatch frontend-refactoring on the module to decompose before next session"; fi; fi

_api="${SUPERDEV_API_URL:-http://localhost:3001/v1/readiness}"; _web="${SUPERDEV_WEB_URL:-http://localhost:3000}"; echo "[superdev] Verifying stack is up ($_api + $_web)..."; if curl -fsS "$_api" > /dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fsS "$_web" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[superdev] Stack OK'; else echo "[superdev] WARN: Stack not fully up — agent may fail. Start your stack (e.g. pnpm dev / npm run dev / yarn dev / bun dev) or override URLs with SUPERDEV_API_URL and SUPERDEV_WEB_URL."; fi
